title: Eurostat Prodcom — Sold production, exports and imports, NACE Rev.2 27.51/27.52 (domestic appliances), 2020-2024
countries: plus non-EU reporters: AL, BA, GE, IS, MD, ME, MK, NO, UA, XS (Serbia)
time_coverage: 2020-2024 (annual; 2024 is provisional/most recent available — dataset last updated 2026-04-27)
units: value indicators (PRODVAL, EXPVAL, IMPVAL, OWNPRODVAL, SCPRODVAL) in thousand EUR; quantity indicators (PRODQNT, EXPQNT, IMPQNT, OWNPRODQNT, SCPRODQNT) in units given by QNTUNIT column per product row (mostly p/st = pieces); *BASE/*FLAG columns are Eurostat confidentiality/estimation flags, not values
license_terms: Eurostat standard reuse policy (free reuse with source attribution) — https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/main/help/copyright-notice
notes: Eurostat migrated Comext/Prodcom off the old BulkDownloadListing facility and the old DS-056120 code named in the task; the current live SDMX 2.1 API lives at a DEDICATED endpoint https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/api/comext/dissemination/ (not the standard /eurostat/api/dissemination/ used by other Eurostat datasets), and the standard dissemination catalogue TOC does not list Prodcom at all. Confirmed current dataset code for the annual Prodcom 'Sold production, exports and imports' dataflow is DS-059358 (version 2.4), found via https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/api/comext/dissemination/sdmx/2.1/dataflow/ESTAT/all. A companion dataflow DS-059359 'Total production' exists but was not downloaded (not requested by task; sold production is the primary series). Eurostat explicitly exempts PRODCOM-domain datasets from the 'no full/unfiltered download' restriction that applies to Comext trade datasets, but we still filtered to the 58 product codes under NACE Rev.2 classes 2751 (electric domestic appliances) and 2752 (non-electric domestic appliances) per task instructions, pulled from the product codelist CXT_PRODCOM2_SOLD (version 6.0) via https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/api/comext/dissemination/sdmx/2.1/codelist/ESTAT/CXT_PRODCOM2_SOLD. Query used SDMX-CSV format, all reporters, all indicators, startPeriod=2020 (returns through 2024, the latest available year). Country coverage is whichever EU/EFTA/candidate countries reported to Eurostat for these codes/years (mostly EU27 + UK/EEA/candidates) -- our target comparator set DEU, ESP, PRT, GRC are all present as 'DE', 'ES', 'PT', 'GR'. Country-filtering to the project's target set can happen in data/processed/. Row count 75,118 (including header); many rows are 0 or ':' (confidential/not-applicable per Eurostat convention), 49,781 rows carry a non-empty/non-zero OBS_VALUE.

failures.reason: HTTP 404 — DS-056120 / standard dissemination API path does not serve Prodcom; Prodcom lives on the separate comext dissemination endpoint under a different current dataset code (DS-059358).
